retry_reason: If __vec_find returns NULL, the label was not found in the vector; retrying with the same input will not change the outcome.
contract_summary: Lookup wrapper: searches for a label in a vector using the input label's vector and size. If found, acquires a reference (refcount increment) on that label and returns it; otherwise returns NULL. The input label is used only as a key and is not modified or released. The caller must check the return value and, if non-NULL, release the reference with a corresponding aa_label_put when done.

judge.reason: Function exclusively calls __vec_find to perform a label lookup with refcount increment; the only non-refcount logic is a debug assertion.
